name: Intellicheck, Inc.
summary: Intellicheck, Inc. is a technology company delivering on-demand digital identity validation solutions for Know Your Customer (KYC) fraud prevention and age verification. The company validates digital and physical identities for financial services, fintech, BNPL providers, e-commerce, retail, law enforcement, and government agencies across North America. Products include IDN-Mobile, IDN-Portal, IDN-Direct, and IDN-Capture, delivered primarily as SaaS through mobile devices, browsers, and retail point-of-sale scanners.

products.name: IDN-Mobile
products.description: Mobile identity validation app set up in under an hour, enabling ID scanning via mobile phone or tablet.

products.name: IDN-Portal
products.description: Includes IDN-Mobile features plus facial biometrics, global document validation, retail POS integration, and online validation.

products.name: IDN-Direct
products.description: API and SDK-based integration of Intellicheck Service into customer apps and systems, includes Risk Score capability.

products.name: IDN-Capture
products.description: Flexible custom white-label experience delivering Intellicheck Service capabilities.

products.name: Intellicheck Service
products.description: Complete identity solution validating IDs, matching ID to person via facial biometrics, and providing risk scores using machine learning.
